summary: Frontend-only iteration 6 visual/behavioral checks for BLOWUP studio. Verified all 10 user-requested changes: removed dividers, single section title, stats text '3–6t / Timers session', hero upsell link to #session, square (rounded-none) buttons across the app, sound toggle removed, beats sub-cards with correct hrefs, Contact title 'Kontakt.', no black-square scroll artifact, and no horizontal overflow on mobile. All 7 desktop scroll-position screenshots confirm NO persistent black square artifact follows the scroll. Site renders cohesively in square/sharp aesthetic.

issues: Spotify embed iframe (embed-cdn.spotifycdn.com) throws a client-side RangeError ('Incorrect locale information provided') and renders a blank white box on desktop. This is a third-party Spotify CDN bug, not introduced by this iteration, but it produces a visible white rectangle in the LYT section. Consider adding hl=en/locale param to the embed URL or wrapping the iframe in a fallback.

verified_changes.#1_no_dividers: PASS — stats grid has no divide-x; header has no border-b when scrolled (computed border-bottom-width=0px); no dividers above titles.
verified_changes.#2_single_title_per_section: PASS — SectionHeader renders only index + h2; configurator h2='VÆLG DIN SESSION.', contact h2='KONTAKT.' (no small uppercase label above).
verified_changes.#3_stats_third: PASS — third stat reads '3–6t' with label 'TIMERS SESSION'.
verified_changes.#4_hero_upsell_link: PASS — data-testid='hero-products-btn' text='Se sessions & beats', href='#session'; clicking scrolls to configurator (top ≈40px from viewport).
verified_changes.#5_beats_cohesion: PASS — buy-ready-beat -> https://www.beatstars.com/blowupstudio ; buy-custom-beat -> https://www.instagram.com/blowup_studio_coprod?igsh=Zm1scmZrZWh4MHFs&utm_source=qr ; configurator-book-btn -> https://blowup-studio.planway.com/. Single-select works (clicking session-option-mix highlights border-brand). Visually consistent squared cards under the session list.
verified_changes.#7_contact: PASS — section id='kontakt' big title 'Kontakt.', email + address link + 'Klar i studiet?' CTA card with Book + Instagram/YouTube/Discord + map iframe.
verified_changes.#8_no_black_square_scroll_artifact: PASS — .cursor-dot and .grain are not present in DOM; glass header no longer uses backdrop-filter. Took 7 desktop screenshots from y=800..9000 and visually inspected — NO persistent black square/rectangle artifact follows the scroll. Background is clean across hero, stats, configurator, releases, artists, gallery, reviews, contact, and footer.
verified_changes.#9_square_aesthetic: PASS — computed border-radius is 0px for hero-book-btn, header-book-btn, configurator-book-btn, buy-ready-beat, buy-custom-beat, contact-book-btn, footer-book-btn. Session option cards and beat cards visually square.
verified_changes.#10_mobile: PASS — mobile viewport 375x812: document.documentElement.scrollWidth=375 (no horizontal overflow). Contact and footer render correctly on mobile.

aesthetic_verdict: The page now reads as a cohesive, sharp-edged editorial layout. Yellow + turquoise accents on black work well; the new beats sub-group sits naturally below the session options thanks to the matching squared card style with turquoise hover/icon treatment. Contact section is cleaner without a form and the 'Klar i studiet?' CTA card looks intentional. Section headers (index + big title) feel less cluttered. Only visible blemish is the third-party Spotify embed crash in the LYT section (pre-existing).
action_items: (Optional / pre-existing) The Spotify embed in Releases throws a client-side RangeError on locale and renders a blank white block. Consider passing a valid locale parameter or graceful fallback. Not part of this iteration's scope but visible to users.
(Cleanup) index.css still contains dead rules (.cursor-dot, .grain) since the components were removed — safe to delete for hygiene.
critical_code_review_comments: SectionHeader.jsx still accepts a `label` prop that is never rendered — callers (e.g. Configurator, Contact) still pass label='...' which is silently ignored. Either remove the prop & call sites or render it conditionally with a guard. Currently harmless.
Lenis raf cleanup in App.js calls cancelAnimationFrame after destroy which is fine, but there is no guard for StrictMode double-mount; not breaking but worth noting.
index.css contains dead CSS (.cursor-dot, .grain, .eq-bar) — remove to keep stylesheet lean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 confirmed all square-style/divider removal requirements. The only outstanding visible issue is a pre-existing third-party Spotify embed crash in Releases (not introduced by this iteration). Custom cursor and grain overlay have been fully removed from the DOM. Screenshots stored under /app/test_reports/screenshots_iter6/.
rca of the issue: User-reported 'black square follows on scroll' RCA: caused by (a) the custom .cursor-dot fixed element that tracked mouse position and remained at a stale offset between mouse moves, combined with (b) the .grain fixed overlay (z-index 80) and (c) backdrop-filter on the .glass header which on some GPUs produced a visible squared compositing layer during scroll. All three have been removed in this iteration (Cursor and Noise components no longer mounted in App.js; .glass now uses solid bg without backdrop-filter). Verified by DOM query — neither element exists — and by 7 screenshots across the scroll range showing no artifact.
